marketing.headline: Design WODs with precision. Coach with intensity.
marketing.subtitle: Build warm-up, strength, and metcon blocks in minutes. Preview the flow live and run a timer built for coaches.
marketing.highlightBuilderBody: Warm-up, Strength, and Metcon blocks with structured movements and live preview.
marketing.highlightTimerBody: EMOM, AMRAP, and For Time with accessible controls and spoken updates.
marketing.highlightUnitsBody: Global lb/kg switch with consistent conversions across the app.
marketing.sampleWarmupBody: 3 rounds · 8 cal row · 10 air squats · 20 sec plank
marketing.sampleStrengthBody: Back squat 5x5 · Build to heavy triple
marketing.sampleMetconBody: 12 min AMRAP · 6 burpees · 10 KB swings · 200m run
marketing.footerLine1: Built for coaches who want clear structure, accessible flows, and product-level polish.
marketing.footerLine2: WOD Builder & Timer · Next.js · TypeScript · Tailwind · Prisma

builder.title: Build a new WOD
builder.subtitle: Create workout
builder.lead: Shape each block with more rhythm, better hierarchy, and a polished coaching view from the first draft.
builder.notesPlaceholder: Add coaching cues, pacing, or athlete notes
builder.emptyBlocks: Add a block to start building your workout.
builder.emptyMovements: No movements yet. Add the first one.
builder.previewEmpty: Preview will appear here as you add blocks.
builder.clearConfirm: Clear the current draft? This cannot be undone.
builder.importError: Invalid file. Please choose a WOD Builder export.

weightPicker.title: Weight picker
weightPicker.demoBody: Try the bar, quick target, and plates flow here before attaching it to a movement.
weightPicker.trackingHint: Reserved for history and PR tracking once persistence is connected.

workoutDetail.title: Workout detail
workoutDetail.lead: Review the session structure, adjust the flow, and keep the timer close for the coaching floor.
workoutDetail.blocksEmpty: Blocks will render here once persistence is wired.
workoutDetail.placeholderBody: We will show warm-up, strength, and metcon blocks here.

workouts.title: Workouts
workouts.subtitle: Your workout library
workouts.lead: Structured sessions, fast access, and a cleaner path from planning to the gym floor.
workouts.emptyBody: Start by creating your first workout. You can add blocks for warm-up, strength, and metcon, then preview the full flow.
workouts.cardBody: Built to move cleanly from preview to execution without losing structure.
